title: secret mod
description: a mod that adds one of the mojang secrets that you could discover from downloading the mod, it might be for the new update, this mod might be deleted if mojang saw this
body: this is a secret mod that adds features for minecraft that a lot of people wanted for the next update, and it's like a scenario for the next updates, also the misssing 1.7 release do to it's bugs, I don't think it should be considered as a secret mod but whatever, it's just a weird mod that adds just random things with just random features for minecraft, it also adds the aether, the sculk and the sand dimensions, it also adds a little bit of food, some mobs used to exist, and some other features that used to exist in the old updates etc...
